job_title: Senior Network Engineer  SD-WAN Deployment (100% Remote)
job_description:
Job Title: Senior Network Engineer  SD-WAN Deployment (Remote)Positions: 5Location: 100% Remote (India preferred)Duration: 4 Months Contract (Possible Extension)Work Hours: Monday  Friday | Night Shift (to support global deployments)
Job SummaryWe are seeking a team of highly skilled Senior Network Engineers to support a large-scale SD-WAN deployment and upgrade project across 1,000+ locations. This role will focus on remotely overseeing installations, coordinating with field technicians, configuring network infrastructure, and ensuring seamless SD-WAN integration and performance optimization.The ideal candidate will have strong experience in enterprise networking, SD-WAN technologies, and remote troubleshooting in large distributed environments.
Key ResponsibilitiesRemotely oversee installation and turn-up of SD-WAN appliances at customer locations.Support deployment and integration of SD-WAN solutions across multiple sites.Coordinate with on-site technicians and field engineers during implementation activities.Configure routing, switching, and network parameters to support SD-WAN deployments.Push configuration updates to network devices to accommodate new SD-WAN infrastructure.Perform pre-installation validation and post-deployment testing to ensure connectivity and performance.Troubleshoot network and deployment issues remotely and provide timely resolution.Monitor network performance and optimize traffic flow and segmentation.Maintain deployment documentation, configuration records, and status reports.Collaborate with cross-functional teams including project management, operations, and vendors.
Required Qualifications5+ years of experience in Network Engineering, preferably supporting enterprise environments.Hands-on experience with SD-WAN deployments (e.g., VeloCloud, Cisco SD-WAN/Viptela, Fortinet, Aruba, or similar).Strong knowledge of routing and switching protocols (BGP, OSPF, VLANs, QoS, NAT, VPNs).Experience working with enterprise networking vendors such as Cisco, Juniper, Aruba, Arista, etc.Experience coordinating with remote field teams and managing deployments across multiple sites.Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills in distributed network environments.Ability to work independently in a fully remote setup with minimal supervision.Willingness to work night shifts to support global deployment schedules.
Preferred QualificationsExperience with large-scale multi-site network rollouts (500+ locations).Knowledge of network security, firewalls, and segmentation strategies.SD-WAN or networking certifications (CCNA, CCNP, VeloCloud, Fortinet NSE, etc.).Experience with network monitoring and management tools.Prior experience in remote deployment or migration projects.Soft SkillsStrong communication and coordination skills.Ability to manage multiple deployments simultaneously.Detail-oriented with strong documentation practices.Team-oriented mindset with a proactive approach to problem solving.Engagement DetailsContract Duration: 4 Months (Potential Extension)Work Model: Fully RemoteShift: Night Shift (Monday  Friday)

job_description: The role of Principal is pivotal in shaping the educational environment and fostering a culture of excellence. As a leader, you will collaborate with faculty, staff, and the community to drive innovation and ensure the growth of both students and educators. This position offers a unique opportunity to influence the future of education while promoting a collaborative atmosphere that encourages professional development and creative problem-solving.Lead the development and implementation of the schools vision and mission, ensuring alignment with educational standards and community needs.Foster a positive school culture that promotes student engagement, academic achievement, and social-emotional well-being.Collaborate with teachers to design and deliver high-quality instructional programs that meet diverse student needs.Oversee the recruitment, training, and evaluation of staff, promoting a culture of continuous improvement and professional growth.Engage with parents and the community to build strong partnerships that support student learning and school initiatives.Utilize data-driven decision-making to assess student performance and implement strategies for improvement.Manage school budgets and resources effectively to enhance educational programs and facilities.Ensure compliance with local, state, and federal regulations, maintaining a safe and secure learning environment.Promote innovative practices and the integration of technology in the classroom to enhance learning experiences.Advocate for the needs of the school and its students at district and community meetings, representing the schools interests.To excel in the role of Principal for School, candidates should possess a blend of leadership, educational expertise, and interpersonal skills. The following qualifications and skills are essential:Masters degree in Education Administration or a related field.Proven experience in educational leadership, preferably in a K-12 setting.Strong understanding of curriculum development and instructional best practices.Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage diverse stakeholders.Demonstrated ability to lead and inspire a team towards achieving common goals.Experience with data analysis and using data to inform instructional practices.Commitment to fostering an inclusive and equitable learning environment for all students.Ability to manage budgets and resources effectively, ensuring optimal use of funds.Passion for innovation in education and a willingness to embrace change and new ideas.Key Responsibilities:Provide academic and administrative leadership to the school.Foster excellence in teaching-learning practices and holistic student development.Lead curriculum implementation, staff mentoring, parent engagement, and institutional growth.Ensure compliance with CBSE norms and promote a culture of values, discipline, and continuous improvement.Desired Attributes: Visionary leadership, excellent communication skills, strategic planning ability, team-building skills, and commitment to value-based education.What We Offer:Opportunity to lead a reputed and progressive CBSE Senior Secondary School.Supportive management committed to educational excellence.Professional growth opportunities and a collaborative work environment.Competitive compensation package commensurate with qualifications and experience.

job_description:
Title: Sr .NET developer
People Management: NoTravel Required: MinimalLocation: Magarpatta City, Pune, MH Join our Team:DecisivEdge is a Company of talented consultants dedicated to identifying and addressing our Customers most pressing opportunities. We have offices in three geographies, Newark, Delaware, United States, Markham, Ontario Canada, and Magarpatta, Pune, India. Our capabilities include optimizing operational business processes, application development, data management, analytics, and business intelligence which we leverage to enable digital transformations in financial services and healthcare. Our Company has developed and commercialized several solutions in a variety of industries including financial services, healthcare, and marine management.
We are looking for a talented and versatile Sr .Net developer to join our team and help us bring our vision to life. In this role, you will work in our Pune, Maharashtra office as an integral member of our Technical Delivery team to ensure we increase our companys success with our growing base of clients.
The Sr .NET developer will be part of a professional, friendly, and fun-loving team that prioritizes its corporate culture focused on four foundational core values:
Put Integrity FirstThink We not MeBe PassionateExecute Flawlessly
Job Summary: 
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Senior Software Developer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining high-quality software solutions tailored to meet our clients' needs. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, providing technical leadership and guidance, ensuring the successful delivery of innovative and scalable projects.Key Responsibilities:Software Development: Design, develop, and maintain scalable and robust software applications using .NET technologies, including C#, ASP.NET, and .NET Core.Database Architecture: Design and implement efficient and secure database structures, ensuring optimal performance and scalability. Experience with mongoDb, SQL Server or other relational databases is crucial.Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work alongside product managers, designers, and other stakeholders to understand project requirements and translate them into effective technical solutions.Full Lifecycle Ownership: Lead and participate in the full software development lifecycle (SDLC), including planning, estimation, development, testing, deployment, and ongoing maintenance.Mentorship & Leadership: Mentor and guide junior developers, sharing best practices and offering technical expertise to help them grow and succeed.Code Quality & Best Practices: Conduct code reviews, enforce coding standards, and identify opportunities for process improvements to ensure high-quality deliverables.Problem Solving & Troubleshooting: Proactively troubleshoot, debug, and resolve complex software defects and technical issues to maintain application stability and performance.Continuous Improvement: Stay abreast of the latest trends and advancements in software development technologies, frameworks, and industry best practices. Contribute to the improvement of internal processes and practices.
Qualifications:
Education: Bachelors or Masters degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field.Experience: 3-5 years of professional experience as a software developer, with strong expertise in .NET Full Stack development.Technical Proficiency:Expertise in .NET technologies, including C#, ASP.NET, .NET Core, and related frameworks.Solid understanding and experience with front-end technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and modern JavaScript libraries/frameworks (e.g., Angular, React, Vue.js).Strong experience in database design, development, and performance tuning, primarily with MongoDb, as well as other relational database systems.Methodologies: Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies, emphasizing collaboration, iteration, and continuous delivery.Cloud & DevOps (Bonus): Familiarity with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS) and DevOps practices, CI/CD is a significant advantage.Problem-Solving: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to dissect complex technical challenges and implement effective solutions.Communication & Teamwork: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a proven ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams, clients, and stakeholders.Leadership: Proven ability to lead projects and mentor junior developers, promoting a culture of collaboration and knowledge sharing.
What We Offer:
Dynamic Work Environment: A collaborative and innovative workplace where your ideas are valued.Career Growth: Opportunities for professional development and career advancement.Cutting-Edge Technologies: Work with the latest technologies and tools in the software development field.Competitive Compensation: A competitive salary and benefits package.If you're passionate about software development, eager to make an impact, and ready to take your career to the next level, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity!

job_description:
We are an agentic Data Science B2B platform focused on delivering predictive outcomes and actionable insights. Primarily serving GCCs and Retail/CPG clients in the US market, we are reimagining data science and enabling organizations to become AI- and future-ready.

We are seeking a high-performing individual contributor on the Data Science team to support the development of production-grade methodologies and solutions, while managing the full lifecycle of DevOps for machine learning models and data pipelines on the platform.

You will work closely in a cross-functional, world-class AI/ML team comprising experts in backend and frontend engineering, data modeling, ML, and LLMOps.

Key Responsibilities:

A. Method Application

1. Apply and integrate various statistical and analytical methods, ensuring high rigor and accuracy in model outcomes
2. Build processes to compare model outputs with internal and external benchmarks for validation and reliability
3. Demonstrate strong experience in ML DevOps across supervised and unsupervised learning methods
4. Apply advanced methods in areas such as univariate forecasting, causal forecasting, price elasticity modeling, customer churn, anomaly detection, market matching, marketing mix modeling, customer segmentation, and store clustering
5. Experience in Retail, CPG, or Manufacturing domains is desirable

B. Solution Engineering

1. Strong programming skills in Python, Java, or Scala
2. Experience with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes

C. Data ETL

1. Experience working with datasets such as Scintilla, Nielsen, Circana, and Retail Media Network
2. Build and automate ETL pipelines capable of handling large-scale data and enabling agentic data enrichment
3. Expertise in data processing tools such as Apache Spark, Apache Beam, or Apache Flink
4. Experience with data warehousing and data lake technologies such as Oracle Object Storage, Apache Hadoop, Apache Hive, Amazon Redshift, Azure Synapse, or PostgreSQL
5. Ability to work with embedded BI solutions
6. Strong understanding of data structures and algorithms for scalable data processing systems
7. Strong knowledge of data governance, data quality, and data security principles

D. Data Storytelling

1. Translate data into actionable insights
2. Effectively communicate findings through data storytelling

E. Workflow Improvements and Monitoring

1. Monitor performance of data science workflows and optimize for efficiency and accuracy
2. Troubleshoot issues and implement best practices such as unit testing, version control, and reproducibility
3. Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for models, algorithms, and deployment processes
4. Maintain knowledge base, including MLOps processes and best practices
5. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deploy and integrate machine learning models into production systems
6. Work closely with technology teams for AI platform development and implementation

job_description:
Role SummaryWe are seeking a highly skilled Generative AI Architect to design and build advanced AI systems for code generation, optimisation, and automation. This role focuses on developing end-to-end intelligent systems leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs), retrieval pipelines, and scalable back-end architectures to enhance developer productivity and modernise software development workflows.
Must-Have QualificationsExpert in Python with strong proficiency in one or more programming languages; C, C++, Java, and JavaScript; deep understanding of DSA and OOP.Deep understanding of transformer architectures, tokenization, embeddings, and code-specific LLMs (e.g., StarCoder, CodeLlama)CodeGen Solutions: Designing, building, and deploying LLM-based applications for code generation, completion, and translation.Team Leadership: Mentoring junior engineers, defining technical standards, and leading end-to-end developmentfrom POC to productionwhile designing and delivering AI-powered systems for code generation and developer tooling.Evaluation & Validation: Developing evaluation suites to ensure the generated code is correct and safe.

job_description:
We are seeking a skilled Senior WordPress / CMS Developer to join our international engineering team. This role involves building dynamic, scalable, and highperformance WordPressbased solutions while contributing to broader CMSdriven digital projects across industries. 
Key Responsibilities 1. WordPress Development Design, develop, and maintain websites and applications using WordPress CMS (custom themes, custom plugins, Gutenberg blocks). Extend core functionalities through custom coding and reusable modules. Optimize site performance, security, and scalability. 
2. CMS Expertise Work with multiple CMS platforms (WordPress primary; Drupal/Joomla optional as addon skills). Build custom templates, reusable components, and flexible content models. 
3. FrontEnd Engineering Collaborate closely with UI/UX designers to implement modern, responsive interfaces. Write clean, structured HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and React/Vuebased interactive features (nice-to-have). 
4. Integrations & Migrations Integrate APIs, thirdparty tools, payment gateways, CRMs, and external services. Perform CMS migrations, data imports/exports, and version upgrades. 
5. Quality Assurance Conduct functional, performance, and crossbrowser testing. Identify, debug, and resolve site issues, including plugin/theme conflicts. 6. Team Collaboration Work with crossfunctional teamsdesign, QA, project management, backend. Provide technical guidance to junior developers. 7. Documentation Maintain clear technical documentation for builds, configurations, and workflows. 
Skills & Qualifications MustHave 47 years of professional experience in WordPress Development. Strong knowledge of PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and WordPress architecture. Experience developing custom themes, custom plugins, and REST API integrations. Understanding of security, SEO, and accessibility standards. Git version control proficiency. 
NicetoHave Experience with Drupal or other CMS platforms. React, Vue.js, or Next.js exposure. Familiarity with DevOps (CI/CD, Docker, cloud hosting). Experience working with distributed international teams. 
What We Offer Opportunity to work with global clients and international teams Exposure to diverse domainsmedia, sports, fashion, entertainment A culture that values learning, creativity, and technical excellence Competitive compensation & professional growth opportunities

job_description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Senior SEO Manager to join our dynamic team at MathonGo. This is an exciting opportunity for someone who is passionate about Search Engine Optimization (SEO) and has a strong background in Google Analytics and Digital Marketing.

Key responsibilities include:

1. Developing and implementing SEO strategies to improve organic search rankings and drive website traffic.
2. Conducting keyword research and analysis to identify opportunities for content optimization.
3. Monitoring and analyzing website performance metrics using Google Analytics to make data-driven decisions.
4. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to optimize website content and improve user experience.
5. Managing and executing link building campaigns to increase domain authority and improve search engine rankings.
6. Keeping up-to-date with the latest trends and best practices in SEO to stay ahead of the competition.
7. Providing regular reports and insights on SEO performance to stakeholders and making recommendations for improvement.

If you are a results-driven individual with excellent English proficiency (written) and a proven track record in SEO, then we want to hear from you. Join us at MathonGo and take your career to the next level!

job_description:
As the Associate Vice President (AVP) – Account Management, you will play a strategic leadership role in driving client relationships, ensuring creative excellence, and delivering strong business outcomes. You will lead multiple accounts and teams, bridging client goals with agency capabilities, while fostering innovation and growth.

Key Responsibilities:

A. Client Strategy & Relationship Management
1. Act as a strategic partner to key clients, understanding their business objectives, challenges, and competitive landscape.
2. Develop and implement effective communication strategies and campaigns aligned with client goals.
3. Build strong, long-term relationships with senior-level client stakeholders.

B. Business & Account Leadership
1. Drive overall account profitability and ensure financial health through smart budget management and cost optimization.
2. Identify and pursue growth opportunities across existing and potential accounts.
3. Oversee and guide teams in delivering top-notch creative solutions that meet both strategic and business objectives.

C. Team Management & Mentorship
1. Lead, mentor, and inspire Account Directors, Managers, and Executives to deliver consistent performance and client satisfaction.
2. Foster collaboration across creative, strategy, and production teams.
3. Encourage continuous learning, trend awareness, and best practices in account management.

D. Strategic & Creative Collaboration
1. Collaborate with planning, creative, and digital teams to ensure the strategic intent is translated into effective campaigns.
2. Review and elevate creative work, ensuring it aligns with the brand vision and delivers measurable impact.
3. Guide to campaign presentations and ensure persuasive, insight-driven storytelling.

E. Operational Excellence
1. Ensure efficient project execution and adherence to timelines, budgets, and quality standards.
2. Maintain accurate forecasts, reports, and documentation for all client accounts.
3. Resolve conflicts proactively and ensure smooth day-to-day operations.

Experience: 10-17 years

We are seeking a seasoned and results-driven Business Head to lead our medical device sales business in Bangalore and Hubli. As a key leader, you'll drive growth, manage sales teams, and develop market strategies to expand our presence in the medical device industry.

- What we offer:

  - Dynamic team and work environment.

job_description:
Job Title: Manager - Sales (Assistant Store Manager Grade)
Location: Hyderabad, Telangana
Industry: B2B Wholesale & Retail
Reports to: Store Business Head (Store Manager)

Job Purpose
The Manager - Sales will oversee sales growth, customer acquisition, and team management across various customer channels, including Traders, HoReCa, and Offices & Institutions. Responsible for driving business development and repeat billing from tagged customers.

Key Responsibilities
Drive overall sales growth and market penetration in target segments.
Lead the customer acquisition strategy to expand the client base.
Manage, mentor, and motivate a team of 15-20 Sales Executives through Department Managers or Team Leaders.
Drive sales across multiple customer channels (Traders, HoReCa, Offices & Institutions).
Lead business development initiatives to increase market share and sales volume.
Ensure repeat billing from tagged customers and enhance customer retention strategies.
Monitor and adjust strategies to achieve sales targets and customer satisfaction.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure operational efficiency and sales alignment.
Evaluate market trends and competition to develop proactive sales strategies.
Maintain regular reporting to the Store Business Head on sales performance and team progress.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Sales Growth: Achieving growth in sales revenue across key customer segments.
Repeat Billing: Maximizing the frequency of repeat sales from tagged customers.
HVS vs NHVS Sales Proportion: Managing the balance between High-Value Sales (HVS) and Non-High-Value Sales (NHVS).
Increasing Share of Wallet: Growing the sales contribution from existing clients.
Achieving Top Line and Bottom Line Business Limits: Meeting financial targets and profitability goals.

Functional Competencies
Strong sales management and team leadership skills.
Ability to develop and execute strategic business development plans.
Proficiency in customer acquisition and retention strategies.
In-depth knowledge of B2B wholesale and retail industry dynamics.
Experience in handling sales across multiple channels.
Knowledge of the local market to understand customer preferences and trends.

Behavioural Competencies
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
High level of empathy and emotional intelligence in team management.
Results-oriented, with a focus on achieving business objectives.

Requirements
Area Sales Manager level experience in FMCG sales.
Background in Processed Food, Commodities, and DnT product range within the FMCG industry.
Minimum Graduate qualification, with preference for PGDBM in Sales & Marketing specialization.
Knowledge of the local market to cater to customer needs effectively.

job_description:
Key responsibilities: 
1. Conduct high-quality research in hydrogen technologies and related areas.
2. Develop innovative and disruptive solutions addressing challenges in the green hydrogen.
3. Collaborate with multidisciplinary research teams in India and Finland.
4. Four years Research and Innovation job--2 years in India and 2 years in finland
5. Synthesize and immobilize photocatalysts for solar hydrogen production; conduct material characterization (XRD, SEM, TEM, FTIR, UV-Vis, etc.) and related data analysis via Python coding/theory/simulations.
6. Utilize programming skills (Python/AI/ML) for data processing, reaction kinetics modeling, and AI/ML applications in catalysis.
7. Conduct high-quality research in hydrogen technologies and related areas.
8. Four years Research and Innovation job--2 years in India and 2 years in finland
9. Maintain detailed research records, write reports/publications, and contribute to project presentations & proposal drafting.

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh
Industry: B2B Wholesale & Retail
Reports to: Store Business Head (Store Manager)

Job Purpose
The Manager - Sales will oversee sales growth, customer acquisition, and team management across various customer channels, including Traders, HoReCa, and Offices & Institutions. Responsible for driving business development and repeat billing from tagged customers.

Key Responsibilities
Drive overall sales growth and market penetration in target segments.
Lead the customer acquisition strategy to expand the client base.
Manage, mentor, and motivate a team of 15-20 Sales Executives through Department Managers or Team Leaders.
Drive sales across multiple customer channels (Traders, HoReCa, Offices & Institutions).
Lead business development initiatives to increase market share and sales volume.
Ensure repeat billing from tagged customers and enhance customer retention strategies.
Monitor and adjust strategies to achieve sales targets and customer satisfaction.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure operational efficiency and sales alignment.
Evaluate market trends and competition to develop proactive sales strategies.
Maintain regular reporting to the Store Business Head on sales performance and team progress.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Sales Growth: Achieving growth in sales revenue across key customer segments.
Repeat Billing: Maximizing the frequency of repeat sales from tagged customers.
HVS vs NHVS Sales Proportion: Managing the balance between High-Value Sales (HVS) and Non-High-Value Sales (NHVS).
Increasing Share of Wallet: Growing the sales contribution from existing clients.
Achieving Top Line and Bottom Line Business Limits: Meeting financial targets and profitability goals.

Functional Competencies
Strong sales management and team leadership skills.
Ability to develop and execute strategic business development plans.
Proficiency in customer acquisition and retention strategies.
In-depth knowledge of B2B wholesale and retail industry dynamics.
Experience in handling sales across multiple channels.
Knowledge of the local market to understand customer preferences and trends.

Behavioural Competencies
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
High level of empathy and emotional intelligence in team management.
Results-oriented, with a focus on achieving business objectives.

Requirements
Area Sales Manager level experience in FMCG sales.
Background in Processed Food, Commodities, and DnT product range within the FMCG industry.
Minimum Graduate qualification, with preference for PGDBM in Sales & Marketing specialization.
Knowledge of the local market to cater to customer needs effectively.

job_description:
About Taxmann Technology Taxmann Technologies is an Indian software company, a part of the larger Taxmann group, focused on developing tech solutions for tax and legal professionals, leveraging AI for faster research, smarter drafting, and efficient workflow management in the complex Indian legal landscape, building on Taxmann's decades of trusted content. They offer custom software, mobile apps, and cloud solutions, merging legal expertise with advanced tech like NLP, serving law firms, corporate legal teams, and government. 
Role OverviewWe are seeking an experienced .NET Full Stack Developer with strong expertise in Desktop Application Development to work on complex, business-critical software products. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience across the full software development lifecycle, from design to deployment and long-term maintenance.
Key Responsibilities Design, develop, enhance, and maintain desktop-based applications using .NET technologies Work across the full stack, including UI, business logic, and database layers Collaborate with product owners, architects, and QA teams to understand requirements and implement scalable solutions Optimize application performance, stability, and security Refactor legacy codebases and implement modern design patterns where applicable Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and technical decision-making Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve complex production issues Contribute to documentation and long-term product maintainability
Required Skills & Experience 5+ years of professional experience in .NET Full Stack Development Strong experience in Desktop Application Development (WinForms / WPF / similar) Proficiency in C#, .NET Framework / .NET Core / .NET 6+ Experience with SQL Server and strong understanding of database design and optimization Solid understanding of OOP principles, design patterns, and SOLID principles Experience with REST APIs and backend service integration Hands-on experience with Git or similar version control systems
Good to Have (Preferred Skills) Exposure to Blazor / ASP.NET Core Experience in migrating legacy desktop applications to modern architectures Knowledge of multithreading and performance tuning in desktop apps Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines
Desired Characteristics Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work independently and take ownership of modules Comfortable working on large, long-running enterprise products Excellent communication and collaboration skills Quality-focused mindset with attention to detail
Qualifications B.E. / B.Tech / MCA in Computer Science, IT, or related field (preferred)

job_description:
Key Responsibilities: 

1. Pipeline ownership - Prioritize leads based on intent and buying signals. Focus on conversion, not volume. 
2. Pipeline generation - Personally drive cold outbound calls, email, and LinkedIn. Treat the channel mix as an experiment, not a script. 
3. Closing - Run discovery and closing calls with US-based SMB Amazon sellers. Qualify, position our offer, convert into clients. The cycle today is 2 calls — your mandate is to test what works and compress where you can. 
4. CRM hygiene - If it’s not in the CRM, it didn’t happen. 
5. Insights loop - Surface objections, competitor mentions, and friction points. Contribute directly to how we position and price our offer. 
6. Playbook creation - Document what works across demos, outbound, and messaging, build the foundation for future hires.

Investigate food safety incidents and complaints
Implement risk mitigation strategies

job_description:
Join us as a Business Development Associate after completing our dynamic traineeship program. This is your opportunity to grow into a high-performing sales professional in the fast-paced world of recruitment technology.

If you have the passion to connect, communicate, and convert, we will equip you with the skills and foundation needed to thrive in the booming SaaS industry and build a long-term career.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Execute cold outreach through emails, phone calls, and LinkedIn messaging
2. Qualify inbound and outbound leads based on ICP and buying intent
3. Book qualified demos and meetings for the sales team
4. Maintain accurate CRM records and activity tracking
5. Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to improve outreach campaigns
6. Follow up consistently with prospects and nurture relationships

Role Structure & Compensation:

1. Traineeship Program Duration: 6 months
2. Working Hours: 8.5 hours per day
3. Trainee Stipend: INR 20,000 per month
4. Full-Time Opportunity: Upon successful completion of the training program and based on performance, candidates may be offered a full-time role as Sales Development Representative with a CTC of INR 10,00,000 per annum (5 LPA Fixed + 5 LPA Variable)

Who Should Apply?

1. Recent graduates or post-graduates from the 2025 and 2026 batches
2. Individuals exploring a career switch into sales and SaaS
3. Professionals looking to restart their careers after a break
4. Candidates with strong communication and interpersonal skills
5. Self-motivated individuals eager to learn and grow
6. Candidates excited to work in a fast-growing SaaS environment

Why Join Us?

1. Structured training and mentorship
2. High-growth career opportunities in SaaS sales
3. Hands-on exposure to recruitment technology and B2B sales
4. Opportunity to work with experienced sales and marketing professionals
5. Performance-driven growth and earning potential

Start Your Journey in SaaS Sales. Learn, Grow, and Build a Rewarding Career With Us.

job_description: The role of Class 11-12 Mathematics Teacher for JEE/NEET Coaching is pivotal in shaping the academic journey of aspiring students. This position not only contributes to the individual growth of students but also enhances the overall success of our educational team. As a Mathematics Teacher, you will collaborate with fellow educators to foster an innovative learning environment that encourages student engagement and academic excellence. This role offers ample opportunities for professional development and growth, allowing you to refine your teaching strategies and contribute to curriculum development.In this role, you will:Design and implement effective lesson plans tailored to JEE syllabus requirements, ensuring comprehensive coverage of essential mathematical concepts.Utilize innovative teaching methods and technology to enhance student understanding and retention of complex mathematical theories.Conduct regular assessments and provide constructive feedback to students, helping them identify areas for improvement and track their progress.Collaborate with fellow teachers to develop interdisciplinary projects that integrate mathematics with other subjects, promoting a holistic educational approach.Organize and lead extra-curricular activities, such as math clubs or workshops, to foster a passion for mathematics among students.Stay updated with the latest trends in mathematics education and JEE/NEET exam patterns to ensure the curriculum remains relevant and effective.Mentor students in exam preparation strategies, helping them build confidence and reduce anxiety related to high-stakes testing.Engage with parents and guardians to discuss student progress and address any concerns, fostering a supportive learning community.Participate in professional development opportunities to enhance teaching skills and stay informed about educational best practices.Contribute to the continuous improvement of the educational program by providing insights and feedback based on classroom experiences.To excel in job_description:
Key Responsibilities:

1. Run paid 25-Point Facebook Ad Audit calls on Google Meet for businesses spending ₹30K+/day (₹9L+/month) on Meta and Google Ads, coming through the VSL funnel.
2. Conduct structured forensic audits using the 25-Point system across Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, GA4, Pixel, and related tools.
3. Identify performance leaks across key metrics such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, conversion rate, audience overlap, creative fatigue, attribution gaps, Pixel/CAPI setup, landing page conversion, offer-market fit, retargeting funnel, and lookalike performance.
4. Quantify revenue leakage clearly and show prospects exactly how much they are losing monthly and the impact of fixing it.
5. Position and close the DFY (Done-For-You) implementation partnership during the call or immediate follow-up.
6. Prepare and send structured audit deliverables within 24 hours using the provided template.
7. Maintain a clean pipeline in Google Sheets with call notes, audit findings, recommendations, and follow-up actions.
8. Execute respectful and persistent follow-ups to move undecided prospects toward closure.
9. Coordinate smooth Day-1 onboarding handoff with the implementation team, including audit reports, scope, and agreed pricing.
10. Participate in weekly marketing calls to share insights from audits, common failure points, objections, and conversion trends to improve funnel performance and refine the 25-Point system.

Important Context:

1. This is not a tele-calling, customer support, or call-center role.
2. You are expected to read and analyze ad accounts like a diagnostic system, not just execute calls.
3. Prior experience in selling high-ticket products or services is essential.
4. You will be trained on the 25-Point Audit System, but must bring strong analytical ability, sales confidence, and the ability to hold conversations with founders managing ₹30K+/day ad spends.
5. The role requires comfort with performance marketing data and the ability to translate it into clear business impact during live calls.

job_description:
Key Responsibilities:

1. Plan, execute, monitor, and close government projects in accordance with contractual requirements.
2. Develop project plans, implementation strategies, timelines, and deliverables.
3. Ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and within budget.
4. Track project milestones, progress, and key performance indicators.
5. Coordinate with state government departments, central government ministries, PSUs, and other stakeholders.
6. Represent the organization in meetings, reviews, presentations, and project discussions.
7. Ensure compliance with government policies, guidelines, and contractual obligations.
8. Manage procurement, logistics, supply, installation, testing, and commissioning activities for project execution.
9. Coordinate with vendors, OEMs, and implementation teams to ensure smooth project delivery.
10. Ensure timely delivery, installation, and acceptance of equipment and infrastructure.
11. Prepare daily, weekly, monthly, and quarterly project progress reports.
12. Maintain project MIS, dashboards, documentation, and compliance records.
13. Present project status updates to senior management and government authorities.
14. Monitor project budgets, expenditures, and resource utilization.
15. Identify project risks and implement appropriate mitigation strategies.
16. Ensure effective resource allocation and cost control throughout the project lifecycle.

job_description:
Job Overview:

As a French Language Interpreter, you will facilitate clear and accurate communication between English and French-speaking clients. Your role involves real-time voice and video interpretation with professionalism and cultural sensitivity.

You will primarily assist:
Client 1: An English speaker from the US or Canada
Client 2: A French speaker from Europe or Africa

Key Responsibilities:

1. Interpret conversations accurately while maintaining cultural context.
2. Facilitate smooth communication without altering meaning.
3. Handle both voice and video-based interpretation professionally.

job_description:
Job DescriptionWere looking for a Java powerhouse who can architect resilient systems, challengelegacy thinking, and ship production-grade code that actually drives outcomes. If youexcel in fast-moving environments, obsess over clean architecture, and think in termsof long-term scalability, this role is built for you.ObjectiveDrive the development of scalable, reliable, and high-performance Java-basedapplications that strengthen core business platforms. This role emphasizes clean,maintainable code, sound architectural decisions, and close collaboration withcross-functional teams to fuel innovation and system stability.
2
Responsibilities Design, develop, test, and maintain Java applications, services, and APIs. Build and support scalable, secure, and high-availability backend systems. Optimize application performance, memory usage, and system throughput. Collaborate with Product, QA, DevOps, and Data teams to deliver integratedsolutions. Troubleshoot, debug, and enhance existing applications and services. Contribute to system architecture, code standards, and engineering bestpractices. Stay ahead of emerging Java frameworks, tools, and industry trends.
Requirements & Qualifications Proven experience with Java (Java 8+) in production environments. Strong knowledge of Spring, Spring Boot, or related Java frameworks. Solid understanding of OOP principles, design patterns, and clean architecture. Experience with RESTful APIs and service-oriented architectures. Hands-on experience with SQL and/or NoSQL databases. Familiarity with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platforms(AWS/GCP/Azure). Strong analytical, debugging, and problem-solving skills. Comfortable working in Agile/Scrum environments.
3
Preferred Qualifications Experience with microservices architecture and distributed systems. Knowledge of Hibernate/JPA and ORM frameworks. Exposure to Kafka, RabbitMQ, or other messaging systems. Understanding of multithreading, concurrency, and JVM performance tuning. Experience with security best practices (OAuth, JWT,authentication/authorization). Contributions to open-source projects or personal Java-based applications.

job_description:
We’re looking for a hands-on, performance-driven content writer who can own content end-to-end- from strategy and scripting to shooting and delivering final assets that drive measurable results. This role is for someone who can write sharp copy, shoot high-performing content, collaborate with editors, and deliver finished creatives that convert. You should be equally comfortable building brand storytelling and optimizing ads for performance.

Key Responsibilities:

A. Content strategy & ownership:
1. Develop and execute a content strategy aligned with business and revenue goals.
2. Build clear content pillars for awareness, education, trust-building, and conversion.
3. Maintain consistency in brand voice across ads, social, website and partnerships.

B. End-to-end content creation:
1. Ideate, script, shoot, and deliver finished content (UGC-style, brand shoots, ad creatives, educational content).
2. Write compelling scripts and ad copies tailored to platform and funnel stage.
3. Create engaging narratives around men’s hair health, product education, and customer journeys.
4. Ensure final output is polished, performance-ready, and on-brand.

C. Performance-led creative:
1. Create ad creatives for Meta, Google, YouTube, and other paid channels.
2. Optimize messaging for different funnel stages.
3. Analyze performance metrics (CTR, hook rate, hold rate, CVR, CPA, ROAS) and iterate content accordingly.
4. Continuously test new angles, hooks, formats, and scripts.

D. Cross-functional execution:
1. Work closely with designers, video editors, performance marketers, and product teams.
2. Support influencer, partnership, and retention campaigns with high-impact content.

company_name: Sir H.N. Reliance Foundation Hospital & Research Centre
job_description:
Assistant Manager Sales (Referral Marketing) (Hospital Experience is must)

Department: Marketing & Business Development
Location: Mumbai

Job Purpose
The Assistant Manager Sales (Hospital Marketing) will be responsible for driving IPD (InPatient Department) business by developing strong referral networks with family physicians, general practitioners, and clinics. The role focuses on increasing patient inflow, strengthening doctor engagement, and contributing to the overall revenue growth of the hospital.

Key Responsibilities
Service Delivery & Referral Development
Develop and manage relationships with family physicians, GPs, and referral partners.
Identify, map, and onboard new referring doctors within the assigned territory.
Promote hospital services, specialties, and consultants to external stakeholders.
Ensure regular follow ups to maintain long term engagement and consistent referral flow.
Coordinate with consultants, operations, and front office teams for seamless patient conversion.
Maintain MIS reports related to referrals and share insights with senior management.
Support marketing campaigns, outreach programs, and brand building initiatives.
Gather market intelligence and provide competition analysis.
Ensure adherence to hospital protocols and ethical business practices.

Strategic Growth Programs

Achieve growth in IPD referrals from family physicians.
Onboard and activate new referring doctors.
Improve OPD to IPD conversion ratio.
Contribute to territory wise revenue targets.
Organize CMEs, health talks, and doctor engagement activities.

Cross Functional Coordination
Willingness to travel within assigned territories.
Strong teamwork, interpersonal communication, and follow through.
Proactive approach to problem solving and relationship management.

Technical / Functional Competencies
Understanding of hospital marketing systems
Strong interpersonal and communication skills
Presentation and negotiation skills
Managerial and time management abilities

job_description:
We are looking for a proactive and target-driven Business Development Representative (BDR) to join our growing sales team. In this role, you will be responsible for identifying and engaging potential customers, conducting outbound outreach, and scheduling qualified demos with Account Executives (AEs) to drive revenue growth. You will be the first point of contact for new prospects and play a key role in building and maintaining the sales pipeline.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Conduct outbound prospecting through cold calls, emails, and LinkedIn to generate new business opportunities.
2. Identify and engage potential customers by understanding their business needs and pain points.
3. Qualify leads based on predefined criteria and ensure that only high-potential prospects are passed on to Account Executives.
4. Schedule and coordinate product demonstrations and meetings with Account Executives.
5. Maintain accurate records of outreach activities and prospect information in CRM platforms such as HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar tools.
6. Handle initial objections and guide prospects toward booking a demo.
7. Collaborate closely with sales and marketing teams to refine outreach strategies and messaging.
8. Stay informed about industry trends, competitors, and market developments to identify new opportunities.

job_description: About OsuiteOsuite is AI-native, full-stack observability  logs, traces, metrics, RUM, and infrastructure monitoring in one suite, with an AI-native layer built on top. Engineering teams get live in under an hour, find root cause and a fix in minutes, and build dashboards just by asking. We sell to fast-moving, microservices-heavy teams. You'll be the first voice they hear.The roleWe're hiring our first SDRs to scale cold outbound into US engineering teams. You'll own the top of the funnel: research accounts, run multichannel sequences, and book qualified meetings for our founders. This is a build-from-zero seat  you'll help shape the playbook, not inherit one.What you'll doRun cold outbound across phone, email, and LinkedIn into US-based engineering and platform teams.Cold call technical buyers with a consultative, credible approach (engineers smell a script  you won't sound like one).Research accounts and personalize outreach around real pain (cost/bloat of legacy tooling, slow instrumentation, alert fatigue).Book and confirm qualified meetings; hit weekly activity and meeting targets.Keep CRM hygiene tight and feed back what messaging lands.Shift & locationRemote from India; US business-hours overlap (approx. 6:30 PM  3:30 AM IST).Bangalore preferred.You're a fit if you have13 years as an SDR/BDR with hands-on cold-calling experience (non-negotiable).Experience selling into the US or international market.Excellent spoken and written English  clear, confident, no friction on a call.Resilience, self-direction, and comfort working a night shift remotely.Bonus pointsSold dev tools / SaaS / infrastructure / observability before, or strong technical curiosity.Hands-on with outbound tooling (Apollo, Outreach/SalesLoft, LinkedIn Sales Navigator).Track record of consistently hitting meeting/pipeline quotaFind the founders email/whatsapp and reach out and answer the questions for a guaranteed interview QuestionerOur buyers are engineers: technical, skeptical, and famously allergic to being "sold"  and to cold calls. Based on what you read about Osuite, name one concrete thing you'd do differently when prospecting an engineering leader versus a typical sales or marketing buyer, and why.A prospect replies to your outreach: "We already use Datadog and it's fine." You don't yet know if there's a real opportunity. What are the first two questions you'd ask back  and what are you trying to learn from each?Write a cold LinkedIn connection note (300 characters) to a Head of Platform Engineering. We're judging relevance and how you avoid sounding like every other rep.Why join nowFirst sales hires at a new-category devtools startup. You shape the playbook, sit close to the founder, and grow into an AE seat as we scale.

job_description:
Job Title: Senior Teacher / Academic Coordinator
Location: Kolkata
Experience: Minimum 10 Years
Language Requirement: Punjabi (Mandatory)
A reputed state board affiliated English medium school is seeking experienced academic professionals who can contribute to the institutions academic excellence and overall development. This opportunity is ideal for senior teachers, academic coordinators or HODs aspiring to take on broader academic and administrative responsibilities in a progressive learning environment.

job_description:
Position: Dean for Business School
Location: Kolkata
Experience: Minimum 10 Years
Role Overview:The role requires a dynamic professional with a strong academic background, proven leadership capabilities, and significant experience in higher education management. The Dean will be responsible for driving academic excellence, faculty development, institutional growth, industry collaboration, and overall strategic leadership of the business school.
Key Responsibilities:Provide strategic academic and administrative leadership for the School of Business. Lead curriculum planning, academic innovation, and outcome-based education initiatives. Ensure compliance with statutory/accreditation requirements. Drive faculty recruitment, mentoring, performance management, and development initiatives. Foster research culture, publications, consultancy, FDPs, seminars, and industry-oriented learning. Strengthen industry partnerships, corporate engagement, internships, and placement support. Oversee academic operations, student development, and institutional quality standards. Lead departmental planning, budgeting, policy implementation, and institutional governance. Promote interdisciplinary learning, innovation, entrepreneurship, and global collaborations. Represent the institution in academic, corporate, and professional forums. Required Experience and Qualifications:Ph.D. in Management / Business Administration / Commerce / allied discipline from a recognized university. Proven experience at Associate Professor / Professor level in reputed higher education institutions. Strong leadership experience such as: Dean / Associate Dean Head of Department (HOD) School Head Campus Academic Leader Acting leadership roles in academic administration Strong understanding of accreditation processes, academic governance, and higher education regulations. Demonstrated track record in teaching, research, publications, academic administration, and institutional development. Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and leadership skills.

job_description:
We are looking for a competitive, innovative, and driven individual to join our customer success team as a customer success associate upon successfully completing our traineeship program. In this role, you will work closely with cross-functional teams, including customer success, product, and engineering, to transform insights into impactful product features and solutions. We invite applications exclusively from freshers who will be completing their graduation/post-graduation in 2026, irrespective of their specialization. If you are patient and comfortable explaining things to international clients, are curious about how software works, eager to learn and adapt, and ready to take on challenges with a proactive and innovative mindset, you are the perfect fit for our team.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Learn our platform, Recruit CRM and understand the recruitment business.
2. Answer client queries via chat, email and video calls to gain experience.
3. Help users understand how to use features and suggest workarounds.
4. Uphold communication guidelines and procedures.
5. Build and nurture client relationships.
6. Continuously strive for exceptional service delivery.

1. Traineeship/Probation details:

2. Traineeship program: 6 months; 8.5 hours per day, payment of INR 20,000 per month.
3. Full-time opportunity: Based on your performance during the training program, you may be offered a full-time position as a customer success associate with a CTC of INR 8,00,000 (INR 6,00,000 base salary + INR 2,00,000 yearly performance pay- paid out quarterly).
4. During training, you will be evaluated on: Application knowledge, communication, learning attitude, problem solving, consistency/commitment, and integrity.

During the initial 6-month training period, you'll be working in the primary Europe shift (12:00 pm - 10:00 pm IST). You'll transition to one of our five core work shifts as a full-time employee as per requirement and availability-

1. Europe - 12:00 pm - 10:00 pm IST Monday - Friday
2. Asia Pacific - 6:00 am - 4:00 pm IST Monday - Friday
3. Half North America - 4:00 pm - 2:00 am IST Monday - Friday
4. Full North America - 8:00 pm - 6:00 am IST Monday - Friday
5. Middle East - Can choose from 4 options (4 days or 5 days a week)

Selection process (Online/Virtual):

The selection process at Recruit CRM includes an online aptitude & English test, an assignment round, and 2-3 virtual interview rounds, all designed to evaluate your analytical thinking, communication skills, and problem-solving abilities. Take the leap and launch your career with Recruit CRM, where curiosity, commitment to excellence, and creative problem-solving are recognized, valued, and nurtured.

Apply now and be a part of our success story!

Note: Our team will proactively share updates at every stage. We request that candidates not contact employees directly via social media or email regarding application status.

job_description:
As a Sales Associate in the NoBroker – New Projects team, you will be at the forefront of driving real estate sales through a consultative and data-driven approach. You will work closely with prospective homebuyers, guiding them throughout their purchase journey—from understanding requirements and project discovery to site visits and final booking.

This is an on-ground, high-engagement role ideal for individuals who are dynamic, persuasive, and passionate about real estate sales. Candidates must be comfortable with daily in-person client meetings and on-ground property visits.

Key Responsibilities:

A. Client Engagement & Requirement Understanding

1. Connect with prospective homebuyers and understand their budget, preferences, and property requirements.
2. Provide consultative guidance to help clients identify suitable residential projects.
3. Build strong relationships with clients through regular follow-ups and trust-based communication.

B. Project Presentation & Sales Process

1. Present and explain real estate projects in detail, including pricing, amenities, location advantages, and investment potential.
2. Coordinate and conduct site visits for clients to shortlisted properties.
3. Assist clients throughout the decision-making process, addressing queries and concerns effectively.

C. Lead Conversion & Closure

1. Follow up consistently with prospects to move them through the sales funnel.
2. Handle objections and negotiate to successfully close bookings.
3. Ensure smooth coordination between clients, developers, and internal teams for final deal closure.

job_description:
As a Data Analytics expert, you will be at the forefront of analyzing and interpreting data to drive business decisions and strategies. Your role will involve manipulating and extracting data using advanced tools such as Python, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, and MS-Excel. 

Key Responsibilities:

1. Utilize data analysis techniques to identify trends and patterns within large datasets.
2. Develop and implement data models to improve data quality and accuracy.
3. Interpret data to provide actionable insights for decision-making.
4. Extract relevant information from various sources to support business objectives.
5. Create and maintain reports and dashboards using Tableau and Power BI.
6. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to optimize data processes and workflows.
7. Stay updated on industry trends and best practices in data analytics to continuously improve processes. 

If you are a highly skilled and motivated data analyst who thrives in a fast-paced environment, this position is the perfect opportunity for you to showcase your expertise and drive meaningful impact through data-driven decisions.

job_description:
We are looking for a dynamic and enthusiastic Corporate Sales Executive to join our team at Pahal Investment. As a key player in driving our business growth, you will be responsible for developing and maintaining strong client relationships through effective communication and exceptional client interaction. Your role will involve leveraging your expertise in lead generation and digital marketing to identify new business opportunities and drive sales.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Utilize your strong time management skills to efficiently prioritize and manage your daily tasks and responsibilities.
2. Proactively generate leads and identify potential clients through various channels and networking opportunities.
3. Engage with clients professionally, understanding their needs and providing tailored solutions to meet their requirements.
4. Implement and maintain a Client Relationship Management (CRM) system to track client interactions, monitor progress, and ensure customer satisfaction.
5. Collaborate with the marketing team to develop and execute digital marketing strategies to promote our products and services to target clients.
6. Analyze market trends and competitor activities to stay ahead of the competition and identify new business opportunities.
7. Achieve and exceed sales targets by developing and implementing effective sales strategies and tactics.

If you are a results-driven individual with a passion for sales and a strong background in corporate sales, we want to hear from you! Join us at Pahal Jain and take your career to the next level.

job_description:
We are an e-commerce-focused team looking for a Shopify UI/UX Designer who can own the entire journey—from a blank Figma canvas to a fully functional, live Shopify storefront.

This is not a “design and hand off” role. We are looking for someone who can design, build, and ship independently—whether it’s a Shopify store, marketing email, or other e-commerce assets.

If you have a strong design sense, deep Shopify expertise, and the ability to translate designs into working storefronts using Liquid and front-end technologies, this role is for you.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Design high-converting Shopify storefronts, landing pages, product pages, and collection pages from scratch using Figma.
2. Create premium, conversion-focused marketing and lifecycle email designs.
3. Design a wide range of e-commerce assets, including banners, ad creatives, social media graphics, promo sections, and pop-ups.
4. Build and maintain scalable design systems, including typography, color palettes, spacing, components, and reusable UI kits.
5. Convert Figma designs into fully functional Shopify themes using Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
6. Customize existing Shopify themes by building new sections, blocks, and templates.
7. Work within Shopify theme architecture (sections, snippets, templates, and settings) to ensure flexibility and scalability.
8. Ensure all designs are mobile-first, responsive, performance-optimized, and conversion-focused.
9. Maintain consistent, premium visual design across all digital assets.
10. Iterate quickly based on feedback and performance insights.

company_name: Sir H.N. Reliance Foundation Hospital & Research Centre
job_description:
Assistant Manager  Corporate Marketing

Department: Marketing & Business Development
Location: Mumbai 

Role Overview:
 We are looking for an experienced Assistant Manager  Corporate Marketing to drive business growth through corporate partnerships, insurance empanelments, and strategic outreach initiatives. The role involves building strong relationships with corporates, TPAs, insurance companies, and key decision-makers while ensuring smooth coordination with hospital teams to enhance the overall patient experience

Key Responsibilities:
  Identify, onboard, and manage corporate clients including PSUs, private companies, TPAs, insurance firms, aggregators, and institutions
 Drive corporate tie-ups for Executive Health Check-ups, wellness programs, and long-term healthcare partnerships.
  Manage end-to-end empanelment processes, ensuring complete documentation and timely approvals.
  Strengthen relationships with HR/Admin Heads, Medical Officers, and CXOs.
  Execute branding and promotional activities within corporate ecosystems.
  Lead corporate marketing activities such as wellness camps, webinars, on-site activation programs, and health awareness initiatives.
  Collaborate with OPD/IPD/EHC teams to ensure seamless patient service delivery.
  Act as a single point of contact between corporates and internal hospital departments.
  Maintain MIS, track targets, and present monthly dashboards to senior management.

Required Skills & Competencies:
  Strong business development and negotiation skills
  Excellent stakeholder management and networking ability
  Effective communication & presentation skills
  Strategic thinker with execution excellence
  Strong MIS/reporting and data-driven approach
  Ability to manage multiple projects and internal coordination smoothly
  Self-motivated, proactive, and goal-oriented

Education & Experience:
  Graduate / Postgraduate (Marketing, Healthcare Management, or related field)
  310 years of experience in corporate marketing or business development 

Working Conditions:
  Individual contributor role
  Office-based with regular field visits
  Coverage: Mumbai + assigned territories 

Key Performance Indicators:
  Corporate tie-ups and empanelments
  Revenue generated from corporate clients
  Corporate engagement activities (camps, events, activations)
  Client satisfaction and repeat engagement
  Timely MIS reporting and target achievement

Interested Candidate can share resume on 8788482043

Thanks & Regards,
HR Team
M.8788482043
Mail us at: veena.yadav@rfhospital.org

job_description:
Key responsibilities: 
1. Sales and Partnership Generation
Actively prospect and identify potential clients and partners in industries focussed on young consumers. Initiate and conduct negotiations, with the goal of closing deals and forming profitable partnerships. 
2. Revenue Generation
Set and achieve revenue targets in line with company objectives. 
Develop and implement strategies to maximize sales and partnership opportunities. 
3. Client and Partner Relationships
Establish and maintain strong relationships with clients and partners. Provide ongoing support and communication to ensure satisfaction and retention. Work closely with the Head of Client Servicing to sell and execute hand-in-hand. 
4. Market Analysis
Stay updated on industry trends and competitive offerings. Use market insights to adapt sales strategies and identify new opportunities.
5. Reporting
Maintain accurate records of sales activities, deal progress, and revenue. Regularly report on sales performance and projections to the management team
6. Collaboration
Collaborate with the marketing and product development teams to align sales efforts with product offerings and marketing initiatives.

company_name: Money Honey Financial Services Private Limited
job_description:
Job Title: Business Analyst
Company: Money Honey Financial Services Pvt. Ltd.

Job Description:

We are looking for a detail-oriented and analytical Business Analyst to evaluate business processes, identify areas for improvement, and recommend effective solutions that drive operational efficiency and business growth. The ideal candidate will work closely with stakeholders, business teams, and technical teams to understand requirements, document processes, and support the implementation of business solutions.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Evaluate existing business processes, anticipate requirements, identify improvement opportunities, and develop effective solutions.
2. Analyze business operations to identify process gaps, inefficiencies, pain points, and areas for optimization.
3. Gather, document, and analyze detailed business requirements from stakeholders.
4. Recommend process improvements and support the transition from manual processes to digital solutions.
5. Design and document user journeys, workflows, and process flows for software applications based on business requirements.
6. Develop and maintain business process models illustrating current and future state processes.
7. Communicate findings, recommendations, project updates, and business insights to stakeholders and management.
8. Create detailed documentation of business requirements, processes, workflows, and proposed solutions.
9. Collaborate with IT and cross-functional teams to implement solutions that align with business objectives.
10. Monitor implemented solutions and contribute to continuous process improvement initiatives.
11. Develop system concepts and process prototypes to improve operational efficiency and productivity.
12. Generate process documentation, reports, and business analysis artifacts to support decision-making.

job_description:
Marketing Manager (Growth Operations & Client Delivery)

About Rapid Neuron:

Rapid Neuron works as a fractional growth partner for B2B companies. We help startups and growth-stage businesses scale through channels like paid acquisition, outbound, SEO, RevOps, content, partnerships, and product-led growth initiatives.

We don’t operate like a traditional agency. We work closely with founders and leadership teams to drive measurable business growth.

We’re now looking for an experienced Marketing Manager who can independently own execution and delivery across multiple growth consulting projects.

About the Role:

This is not a conventional “Account Manager” role.
You’ll be responsible for ensuring strategy turns into execution — consistently, every week.

You will work directly with founders, growth strategists, and specialists across different growth channels to keep projects moving with speed, structure, and accountability.

Think of this role as running the internal growth engine behind client delivery.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Lead delivery and execution across multiple client growth projects.
2. Attend client strategy and review calls.
3. Translate growth strategy into clear execution plans and weekly priorities.
4. Coordinate with internal teams across performance marketing, SEO, content, outbound, lead generation, CRM/RevOps, partnerships, and growth initiatives.
5. Track deliverables, timelines, KPIs, and overall project momentum.
6. Ensure tasks are executed on time with high accountability.
7. Maintain smooth communication between clients and internal teams.
8. Identify bottlenecks proactively and drive problem-solving initiatives.
9. Support the implementation of growth experiments and scalable systems.

Who This Role Is Ideal For:

1. Professionals looking to move beyond execution into ownership and operations.
2. Individuals interested in working directly with founders and growth strategy teams.
3. Candidates who enjoy building systems and processes, not just completing tasks.
4. Professionals eager to lead high-impact client engagements.
5. Individuals looking to grow into larger growth, strategy, or operations leadership roles.

Perks:

1. High ownership and autonomy.
2. Direct exposure to founders and leadership teams.
3. Opportunity to work across multiple industries and growth channels.
4. Fast-paced learning environment with real responsibility.
5. Flexible and startup-driven work culture.

Employment Type: Full-time
Experience Required: 3–4 Years
Location: Remote / Hybrid
Compensation: Competitive, based on experience and capabilities

If this sounds like you, apply now and tell us why you’d be a strong fit for Rapid Neuron.

job_description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and enthusiastic Test Engineer with 1–2 years of experience in software testing to join our growing technology team. The ideal candidate should have a strong understanding of software quality assurance processes, testing methodologies, and automation concepts. Exposure to Cypress automation testing is considered a strong advantage.

As a Test Engineer, you will work closely with developers, product managers, and cross-functional teams to ensure the delivery of high-quality software products. You will be involved in designing test scenarios, executing test cases, identifying defects, and contributing to the continuous improvement of testing practices. This role is ideal for candidates who are passionate about quality, eager to learn modern testing tools, and capable of working in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Understand business and functional requirements to create effective test strategies and test cases.
2. Perform functional, regression, integration, and system testing for web-based applications.
3. Execute manual and automated test cases to validate application functionality and performance.
4. Identify, document, track, and report bugs using defect management tools.
5. Collaborate with development teams to reproduce issues and verify fixes.
6. Participate in sprint planning, requirement analysis, and daily stand-up meetings in Agile environments.
7. Assist in maintaining test documentation, test reports, and quality metrics.
8. Contribute to automation testing initiatives using Cypress where applicable.
9. Ensure software releases meet quality standards and user expectations.
10. Continuously learn and adopt modern QA tools, frameworks, and best practices.

Educational Qualification:

1. Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.

Preferred Candidate Profile:

1. The ideal candidate is passionate about software quality and has a keen eye for identifying issues before products reach end users.
2. Candidates who are eager to build a career in automation testing and are willing to work with modern testing frameworks like Cypress will be highly preferred.
3. A proactive attitude, willingness to learn, and ability to adapt to changing project requirements are essential for success in this role.

job_description:
About the Role:-
We are seeking a qualified and detail-oriented Chartered Accountant (CA) to join our Finance & Accounts team. The role involves managing end-to-end financial operations, ensuring statutory and regulatory compliance, overseeing financial reporting, and supporting strategic business decisions through financial analysis and insights. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in accounting standards, taxation, audits, and financial controls, along with the ability to work collaboratively across departments to drive operational excellence and financial integrity. This position offers an opportunity to play a key role in strengthening the organization's financial processes, compliance framework, and overall business performance.

Roles and Responsibilities: -
1. Oversee the day-to-day financial operations of the company, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, general ledger, and payroll.
2. Manage and ensure compliance with IND AS, tax regulations, RERA compliance and internal controls.
3. Prepare financial statements and reports, including monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
4. Analyze financial data and provide insights and recommendations to senior management for decision-making.
5. Manage the annual audit process and liaise with external auditors and tax authorities.
6. Supervise and train accounting staff to ensure accurate and timely financial reporting.
7. Develop and maintain accounting policies, procedures, and systems to ensure efficiency and accuracy.

Key Skills/Experience the Candidate Should Have -
Technical (T) and Non-Technical (NT):-
1.  Knowledge of IND AS, tax regulations, and internal controls.
2. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
3. Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
4. Ability to manage multiple priorities and meet tight deadlines.
5. Well verse with accounting software (ERP, SAP)
6. Ability to work independently and in a team environment.
7. Attention to detail and accuracy.

Educational Qualification:-
CA

job_description:
Key Responsibilities:

A. User Success & Product Feedback
1. Work closely with design partners and early users to understand their goals, challenges, and feedback.
2. Identify recurring user issues, prioritize them based on impact, and coordinate with the product and engineering teams to drive resolution.
3. Conduct user research and analyze user behavior to uncover barriers to activation, engagement, and retention.
4. Track user journeys and funnel drop-offs to identify opportunities for product and growth improvements.

B. Growth, Community & Partnerships
1. Identify, onboard, and manage creators, influencers, and early champions who can help drive adoption of VISL AI.
2. Build and nurture communities across platforms such as Reddit, Discord, WhatsApp, and other creator ecosystems.
3. Work closely with creators to help them achieve success with the product and remove friction in their workflows.
4. Experiment with new acquisition channels, growth loops, referral programs, and community-led growth initiatives.

C. Content, Positioning & Distribution
1. Help define and refine the positioning, messaging, and key value propositions of VISL AI
2. Build and manage the content calendar across social media and owned channels.
3. Coordinate with creative interns and external contributors to ensure consistent content production and distribution.
4. Identify and work with writers, creators, and contributors to produce blogs, case studies, tutorials, and thought leadership content.

D. Growth Operations & Automation
1. Build and maintain landing pages and optimize conversion across the user funnel.
2. Create dashboards and analyze acquisition, activation, retention, and engagement metrics.
3. Use AI, no-code tools, and automation platforms to streamline workflows and improve team productivity.
4. Design systems and automations for user onboarding, feedback collection, creator management, and internal operations.

job_description:
Job ​Title: Business Development ​Executive
Primary Job Purpose:
-A sales role focused on acquiring new business for membership, awards and sales of selected products and services.
-To take responsibility for individual and team targets, increasing membership and awards sales by self- sourcing leads, working on marketing campaigns and closing suitable membership & award sales prospects.
-Achieving targets set around ad-hoc sales projects and campaigns as directed by the Head of Sales & Business Support Manager.
-To ensure all personal targets and KPI’s are achieved on a daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly and annual base  

Brief Description of Tasks:
-To achieve and exceed set revenue targets for membership & award sales.
-To ensure that sales activities (client meetings) are carried out in line with agreed expectations and that the client records are maintained within the CRM
-To achieve sales KPIs.
-Take responsibility for the sourcing and management of leads within expected timeframes 
-Maintain a well-organized, strong pipeline with regular and accurate opportunity progress, Pipeline management and no stagnation.
-To communicate effectively with the Head of Sales and Business Support Manager with regards to progress and requirements for support.
-To be proficient in managing all aspects of Business Development, including managing any client objections leading to deal closure. 
-To motivate yourself and those around you to ensure all individual and team targets are achieved.
-To contribute to medium to long term sales planning and sales projects as appropriate.
-To work with internal departments to deliver customer requirements in a timely, cost-effective way that does not jeopardize quality of service or relationships, ensure SLAs are adhered to where applicable.
-To manage personal time effectively by balancing it appropriately between alternating sales projects and income objectives.
-To undertake sales projects and campaigns as identified by the Head of Sales & Business Support Manager within agreed timeframes and ensure objectives are achieved.
-To represent the British Safety Council to external and internal customers professionally at required meetings or events in an enthusiastic, passionate and consultative man

Health and Safety
-​To understand your own health and safety responsibilities
