job_description:
Are you a talented Mechanical Engineer looking to take your career to the next level? We are seeking a dynamic individual with expertise in AutoCAD, MS-Office, SolidWorks, Catia, ANSYS, and Autodesk Fusion 360 to join our team. As a key member of our engineering department, you will have the opportunity to work on exciting projects and collaborate with a talented team of professionals.

Key responsibilities:
1. Design and develop innovative mechanical components and systems using AutoCAD, SolidWorks, Catia, and Autodesk Fusion 360.
2. Conduct simulations and analyses using ANSYS to optimize product performance and reliability.
3. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure the successful completion of projects within established timelines.
4. Provide technical support and guidance to junior engineers and drafters.
5. Participate in design reviews and provide feedback to improve overall product quality.
6. Stay current on industry trends and advancements in mechanical engineering software and technology.
7. Contribute to the continuous improvement of engineering processes and procedures to enhance efficiency and productivity.

If you are a motivated and creative Mechanical Engineer with a passion for innovation, we want to hear from you!

job_description:
As an Electronics Engineer , you will have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects that push the boundaries of technology. If you are passionate about Arduino, ARM Microcontroller, C Programming, C++ Programming, Circuit Design, Embedded Systems, Internet of Things (IoT), PCB Design, Python, and Raspberry Pi, then this is the perfect role for you.

Key Responsibilities:
1. Design and develop innovative electronic circuits and systems using Arduino, ARM Microcontroller, and Raspberry Pi.
2. Create and implement embedded software using C and C++ programming languages.
3. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate IoT technologies into our products.
4. Design and optimize PCB layouts for manufacturing and assembly.
5. Troubleshoot and debug electronic systems to ensure optimal performance.
6. Stay up-to-date on the latest advancements in electronics engineering and IoT technologies.
7. Provide technical support and guidance to junior engineers and team members.

job_description:
We are seeking a technically strong and commercially driven sales engineer to develop and manage customer relationships across the mining, quarry, infrastructure and construction sectors. The role involves identifying customer requirements, preparing techno-commercial proposals, and supporting the complete sales cycle from lead generation to order closure and after-sales coordination.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Generate new business opportunities in mining, quarrying, construction, infrastructure, C&D waste, and recycling sectors. 
2. Conduct customer site visits to understand operational challenges and recommend suitable solutions. 
3. Promote partner brands to target customers.
4. Coordinate with OEM principals and internal teams for application engineering, quotations, and technical clarifications. 
5. Develop and maintain strong relationships with contractors, plant owners, consultants, and project stakeholders. 
6. Track sales pipeline, customer interactions, and project status through CRM tools. 
7. Participate in product demonstrations, exhibitions, trade shows, and customer events. 
8. Support negotiations, commercial discussions, and order finalization. 
9. Coordinate installation, commissioning, and after-sales support activities.
10. Monitor market trends, competitor activity, and upcoming projects in assigned territories. 
11. Achieve sales targets and business growth objectives. 

Key performance indicators (KPIs):

1. Revenue achievement against targets.
2. New customer acquisition.
3. Market coverage and customer visits.
4. Customer satisfaction and repeat business.

What we offer:

1. Opportunity to work with leading industrial equipment brands.
2. Performance-driven growth opportunities.
3. Technical and product training.
4. Dynamic entrepreneurial work environment.

job_description:
Step into the world of aesthetic dermatology with Oliva Skin, Hair & Body Clinics. Oliva is India’s #1 cosmetic dermatology brand with 15+ years of expertise and the largest team of dermatologists in the country.

We are inviting you to be part of a journey where science, technology, and patient care come together to create meaningful impact. This role offers a structured, growth-oriented career in aesthetic medicine with strong work-life balance.

About the Role:

If you are an MBBS doctor looking for a career that blends professional growth with work-life balance, this opportunity is for you. There are no emergency duties or night shifts—only structured learning, clinical exposure, and career development in aesthetic dermatology.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Perform advanced aesthetic procedures under the guidance of senior dermatologists.
2. Ensure a safe, positive, and high-quality experience for every client.
3. Maintain accurate, clear, and compliant medical documentation.
4. Support the clinic team in achieving service quality and operational goals.

Growth Path:

1. Comprehensive Training: Structured training in aesthetic dermatology at the Hyderabad training center (travel and accommodation covered).
2. Paid Learning: Full salary during training to ensure financial stability while learning.
3. Career Progression: Opportunity to become an experienced aesthetic physician within 2 years under expert mentorship from leading dermatologists in India.

Why Join Oliva?

job_description:
Department: Sales & Business Development
Location: Pune, India (On-site)Employment Type: Full-Time
STRICT REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE):
- Proven sales experience strictly within the IT industry is REQUIRED.
- Must have active clients, existing leads, or a strong sales pipeline on hand.
- Must be a revenue-driven sales professional (hunter profile).
- Must own a personal laptop/system capable of handling CRM tools, demos, and presentations
Role Overview: This role is purely sales-focused and targets professionals who can generate business, close deals, and drive revenue immediately. The IT Key Accounts Sales Manager will be responsible for acquiring new clients, expanding existing accounts, and selling IT services including software, website, and application development solutions.
Key Responsibilities:
- Drive new business acquisition through existing network, leads, and self-generated prospects.
- Aggressively hunt and close IT sales opportunities in B2B markets.
- Sell IT solutions including Website Development, Application Development, Software Solutions, and IT Services.
- Manage and grow high-value client accounts while identifying upsell opportunities.- Own the full sales cycle: lead generation to closing.
- Conduct client meetings, presentations, and demonstrations.
- Build strong relationships with decision-makers and stakeholders.
- Achieve and exceed sales targets.
- Maintain accurate pipeline tracking using CRM tools.
- Stay updated on market trends and competitors.
Qualifications & Skills:
- 4–6+ years of experience in IT Sales (B2B mandatory).
- Strong track record of closing deals and achieving targets
- Existing client base or ready-to-convert leads required.
- Solid understanding of IT services and development processes.
- Excellent sales, negotiation, and communication skills.
- Self-motivated and target-driven.
- Experience using CRM tools (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.).
Preferred Profile:
- Experience selling IT solutions, SaaS, or digital services.
- Strong network in enterprise or SME segment.
- Ability to generate revenue within the first 30–60 days.

job_description:
We are looking for a motivated Academic Counselor to provide career guidance to prospective students. The primary focus is on helping students navigate analytics course offerings and admissions requirements to drive enrollments. This role is ideal for candidates with strong communication skills who want to guide students in analytics.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Provide personalized guidance to students on academic programs, curriculum, and fees.
2. Engage with leads and follow up on inquiries to drive enrollments.
3. Conduct presentations and counseling sessions to explain course features and career opportunities.
4. Guide students through the end-to-end admission process, including documentation.
5. Build strong relationships with students and parents to ensure a smooth onboarding experience.
6. Maintain accurate records of counseling sessions and follow-ups in the CRM system.
7. Collaborate with internal teams to meet enrollment targets and organizational goals.

job_description:
Key Responsibilities: 

1. Serve as the bridge between the development team, leadership, and clients to ensure smooth communication and alignment across all stakeholders.
2. Gather, document, and communicate clear technical requirements, user stories, specifications, and product requirements to development teams.
3. Build and ship features, prototypes, and applications independently when required, contributing to both frontend and backend development.
4. Provide regular updates to leadership on technical progress, product development, risks, and execution status through reports and presentations.
5. Represent the company and products in client meetings, demos, and technical discussions while addressing queries and collecting feedback.
6. Track sprint progress, identify blockers or delays early, and maintain transparency between technical and non-technical teams.
7. Support development teams during high-priority workloads, product launches, or critical delivery phases.
8. Collaborate with leadership to define, refine, and execute the overall product vision, roadmap, and strategic initiatives.

job_description: ROLE OVERVIEWWe are looking for a driven Performance Marketing & Engagement Associate to join our fast-growing Product & Growth team. This is a fantastic entry-level opportunity for someone passionate about user engagement, data-driven marketing, and creating measurable business impact. You will work on improving core growth KPIs  Activation, Engagement, Conversion, and Acquisition  through performance marketing channels and engagement platforms like WebEngage.KEY RESPONSIBILITIES Plan, create, and execute campaigns and user journeys using engagement tools (WebEngage or similar). Support performance marketing initiatives to drive user acquisition and retention. Collaborate with product and growth teams to design strategies improving Activation, Engagement, Conversion & Acquisition metrics. Monitor campaign performance, analyze results, and share actionable insights with the team. Continuously test and optimize campaigns, creatives, and messaging to maximize ROI. Stay updated with the latest performance marketing and engagement trends and tools.REQUIREMENTS 01 year of experience in performance marketing, CRM, or engagement platforms (internship experience counts). Basic understanding of digital marketing channels  paid ads, email, push notifications, in-app messaging, etc. Analytical mindset with the ability to read data, identify patterns, and suggest improvements. Strong communication and problem-solving skills with eagerness to learn in a fast-paced startup. Prior exposure to WebEngage, MoEngage, CleverTap, or similar tools is a plus (not mandatory).USE OF AI POLICY Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to accelerate daily work  from drafting copy and campaign briefs to generating creative variants quickly. Apply AI in campaign planning for audience insights, journey design, and A/B test ideas. Use it further for report summaries, UTM generation, and automating repetitive tasks  enabling more focus on strategy and optimization.WHY JOIN US? Work on real growth problems and directly impact core business KPIs and millions of users. Learn end-to-end performance marketing and engagement strategies from the ground up. Be part of a high-energy, mission-driven team with strong career growth potential. Get hands-on exposure to cutting-edge marketing and engagement tools Skills: Digital Marketing, Performance Marketing, CleverTap, Google Analytics, Marketing Automation, User Engagement, Customer Relationship Management (CRM), Content Writing and Creative Writing

job_description:
As a Business Development Manager at Satyajan Energy Solutions Private Limited, you will play a crucial role in driving the growth and success of our company. We are looking for a talented individual with expertise in market research, client relationship management (CRM), and strategy development.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Conduct thorough market research to identify new business opportunities and trends in the energy sector.
2. Develop and implement strategic plans to expand our client base and increase revenue.
3. Build and maintain strong relationships with existing clients to ensure customer satisfaction and retention.
4. Collaborate with the sales team to create targeted marketing campaigns and promotional materials.
5. Analyze data and metrics to track the success of business development initiatives and make data-driven decisions.
6. Stay up-to-date on industry developments and competitor activities to identify potential threats and opportunities.
7. Present regular reports and updates to senior management on business development activities and performance metrics.

If you are a proactive and results-driven professional with a passion for the energy industry, we invite you to join our dynamic team and help us achieve our goals. Apply now to be a part of our exciting journey towards success!

5. Planning & forecasting: Configure CO-PA planning frameworks and integrate them with broader corporate budget workflows.

job_description:
This is NOT a typical software engineering job. We’re looking for someone who can: write and review high-quality code, understand our existing codebase deeply and convert client requirements into intuitive features. You will act as the architect who helps us meet our clients' product expectations.

Key Responsibilities:
A. Ship features (hands-on):
1. Build features across multiple stacks: Python (for ML/AI) + ReactJS (for Frontend) + Laravel (for Backend) + PostgreSQL (for database).

B. Manage deployments & infrastructure:
1. Work with Amazon EC2, Linux servers, Amazon RDS, S3.
2. Handle logging, server-level debugging, and production-ready best practices.

C. Requirement Understanding:
1. Convert business ideas into technical specifications.
2. Do QA testing before releases.

D. Work closely with clients:
1. Join client calls & support calls.
2. Understand their workflow, pain points, and requirements.
3. Debug live issues and coordinate fixes with engineering.

job_description:
This is a high-trust, dual-mandate role designed for an early-career professional who is ready to operate at the center of a fast-scaling B2B tech company. You will work directly with the CxOs—supporting active customer engagements on one side and managing the CEO’s time, schedule, and operational cadence on the other.

If you are analytical, proactive, and thrive in a high-ownership environment, this role offers rare exposure to how a technology business is built and operated at the leadership level.

Key Responsibilities:

A. Customer Engagement Support

1. Coordinate and prepare materials for CxO-led client meetings, quarterly business reviews, and strategic discussions.
2. Track action items, follow-ups, and commitments arising from client interactions.
3. Liaise with internal teams to ensure timely delivery of client commitments.
4. Draft client-facing communications, proposals, and summary notes as required.
5. Maintain accurate records of key accounts and engagement history.

B. Executive Administration — CEO Support

1. Manage the CEO’s calendar, including scheduling, prioritization, and conflict resolution.
2. Plan and coordinate domestic and international travel, including flights, accommodation, visas, and itineraries.
3. Prepare briefing documents, agendas, and pre-read materials for meetings.
4. Manage correspondence, follow-ups, and prioritize incoming communications.
5. Coordinate across leadership and internal teams to ensure execution of decisions.
6. Handle expense tracking, reporting, and administrative documentation.

ElevateX Solutions is hiring an Admission Counsellor (Inside Sales) for its Noida office. The role involves engaging with prospective students, guiding them through academic program options, and converting inquiries into successful admissions through structured counselling and follow-ups.

This is a target-driven inside sales role requiring strong communication skills, persuasion ability, and a customer-centric approach.

Key Details:

1. Location: Sector 125, Noida
2. Salary: ₹6 LPA – ₹8 LPA
3. Working Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

1. Counsel prospective students regarding UG and PG programs.

job_description:
Hiring: Growth Marketer

Company: Documentation.AI
Location: Hyderabad
Work Mode: Full-Time, Work From Office

About the Role:

Documentation.AI is hiring a Growth Marketer to work directly with the founders and run fast growth experiments across SEO, AEO, outbound marketing, content, and lead generation.

This is not a traditional marketing role focused only on writing content or managing campaigns. We are looking for someone curious, execution-focused, hands-on, and excited about using AI tools to move faster and scale smarter.

About Documentation.AI:

Documentation.AI is an AI-native documentation platform built for modern companies. The platform helps teams create, maintain, and publish product documentation, API docs, help centers, and internal knowledge bases from a single place.

The goal is to make product knowledge always updated and accessible for both humans and AI agents across onboarding, support, product discovery, and internal workflows.

The company is backed by CEOs of leading startups and technology companies.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Run SEO and AEO content experiments to drive organic growth
2. Create blogs, landing pages, comparison pages, and other growth-focused content
3. Execute cold outreach campaigns through email and LinkedIn
4. Create content for founders, LinkedIn profiles, communities, and newsletters
5. Identify ideal customer profiles (ICPs) and target accounts
6. Write, test, and optimize outreach messaging and campaign flows
7. Use AI tools to research, write, personalize, and automate marketing workflows

job_description:
About Us:

tokens& is a global AI community and events company building the future of intelligence, with 60,000+ members and 400+ partners, and is growing rapidly.

We host hackathons, summits, and gatherings where founders, engineers, and researchers building the future of AI come together. Our events connect frontier labs, leading startups, and top investors — bringing them into the same room to build, learn, and collaborate.

Our partners include OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, NVIDIA, Perplexity, ElevenLabs, Cohere, ByteDance, Andreessen Horowitz, Accel, Y Combinator, Lightspeed Venture Partners, J.P. Morgan, and many more.

The Role:

We’re hiring two Founder’s Associates to work directly with the founder on the highest-leverage parts of the company. You’ll own real work, interact with leading founders and lab leaders, and contribute directly to everything we build and execute.

The scope is intentionally broad — we’re looking for people who can take ownership, adapt quickly, and solve problems independently.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Protect the founder’s time and independently manage responsibilities that do not require direct founder involvement.
2. Reach out to top AI founders, researchers, and investors for speaking opportunities and partnerships.
3. Manage event operations, including vendors, venues, execution planning, and attendee experience.
4. Handle inbox management, calendar coordination, and priority management for the founder.
5. Support the wider team to ensure smooth execution and timely delivery across projects.
6. Take ownership of high-priority tasks and adapt to changing business needs.

Why This Opportunity Is Unique:

You’ll work directly with people at the center of the global AI ecosystem, including teams from companies like OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, and NVIDIA, along with some of the world’s leading AI founders and investors.

This role offers an exceptional learning experience and exposure to one of the world's fastest-growing industries.

Are you a tech-savvy individual with a passion for all things data-related? Do you have experience in data entry and copywriting? If so, we have the perfect opportunity for you! 

In copywriting you just need to copy paste the data
And in this data entry yoy need to Fill data..

If you are a detail-oriented individual with a strong work ethic and a desire to learn, we want to hear from you! Join us  and take your career to the next level in the exciting world of big data and copywriting. Apply now!

job_description:
About the Role:

1. We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and trustworthy Personal Manager to the CEO who can manage both professional and personal responsibilities of the CEO.
2. The ideal candidate will act as the CEO’s right hand, ensuring smooth coordination of business operations, administrative activities, legal matters, meetings, travel, and other official and personal tasks.
3. This role requires excellent communication skills, confidentiality, multitasking abilities, and a strong sense of ownership.

Key Responsibilities:

A. Executive & Administrative Support

1. Manage the CEO’s calendar, appointments, meetings, and daily schedule.
2. Coordinate internal and external meetings and prepare meeting agendas and minutes.
3. Handle email correspondence, follow-ups, and communication on behalf of the CEO.
4. Manage confidential documents, reports, and business records.
5. Track pending tasks and ensure timely completion across departments.

B. Legal & Compliance Coordination

1. Coordinate with lawyers, consultants, and legal advisors regarding ongoing legal matters.
2. Maintain records and documentation related to legal cases and compliance requirements.
3. Follow up on court dates, legal notices, agreements, and related documentation.
4. Assist in drafting, reviewing, and organizing contracts, agreements, and official documents.

C. Business Operations Support

1. Coordinate with different departments to ensure smooth execution of business activities.
2. Monitor project timelines and provide regular updates to the CEO.
3. Conduct research and prepare reports, presentations, and business summaries.
4. Assist in vendor management, partnership discussions, and business correspondence.

D. Travel & Event Management

1. Arrange domestic and international travel, accommodation, and itineraries.
2. Coordinate business events, conferences, and executive meetings.
3. Manage expense reports and travel-related documentation.

E. Personal & Miscellaneous Tasks

1. Handle personal assignments and special projects assigned by the CEO.
2. Manage personal appointments, bookings, and scheduling requirements.
3. Coordinate with household staff, vendors, and service providers when required.
4. Support the CEO in both business-related and unofficial responsibilities.

What We Offer:

1. Direct exposure to leadership and strategic business operations.
2. Opportunity to work closely with the CEO and gain cross-functional business experience.
3. Fast-paced learning and growth environment.

job_description:
Key Responsibilities:

A. Student Guidance & Mentorship

1. Act as a mentor and first point of contact for students regarding academic and career-related guidance.
2. Conduct regular one-on-one check-ins to understand student progress, challenges, and goals.
3. Provide structured guidance, clarity, and motivation to help students stay on track.
4. Escalate complex or sensitive student concerns to the Progression Manager when required.

B. Student Engagement & Support

5. Support and execute student engagement initiatives to enhance learning outcomes.
6. Identify students who may require additional support or intervention.
7. Assist in conducting mentoring sessions, group discussions, and student touchpoints.
8. Collect and share student feedback to improve engagement and mentoring processes.

C. Progress Tracking & Insights

9. Maintain and update student progress trackers using Google Sheets and Excel.
10. Assist in reviewing academic and engagement data for student monitoring.
11. Share key observations and insights with the Progression Manager to enable timely interventions.
12. Support additional responsibilities and extended working hours during peak admission periods, when required.

Why Join Newton School:

1. High-impact role with meaningful ownership from Day 1.
2. Exposure to end-to-end program and university operations.
3. Opportunity to work closely with senior leadership and university authorities.
4. Potential opportunity for full-time conversion based on performance.

job_description:
Are you a dynamic and results-driven individual with a passion for B2B sales and stakeholder management? Zopper is seeking a talented relationship manager to join our team and drive sales growth in the retail management sector. 

Key Responsibilities:

1. Stakeholder management: Build and maintain strong relationships with Brand HQ teams, retailers, service centers, and promoters. Act as the primary point of contact to address queries, resolve concerns, and ensure ongoing support to achieve sales targets.
2. Training: Design and deliver effective training programs for retail owners, service staff, and promoters, ensuring they are well-equipped to understand and communicate the features and benefits of Device Protection Plans.
3. Digital engagement: Engage stakeholders via WhatsApp, email, and calls to share updates, provide support, and drive awareness. Leverage digital tools to generate leads and enhance engagement.
4. Promoter & retail engagement: Work closely with promoters and shop owners to build product visibility and mindshare. Plan and execute promotional activities and events to boost offline sales.
5. Reporting: Maintain accurate records of sales, training, and stakeholder interactions. Provide regular reports with insights on performance, market trends, and improvement opportunities.

If you have a proven track record in B2B sales, possess excellent communication and negotiation skills, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you! Join Zopper and take your career to the next level in retail management sales. Apply now!

job_description:
Key Responsibilities:

1. SpEdPLAY Redesign (Core Mandate): Lead the redesign of existing SpEdPLAY games using the Octalysis Framework (8 Core Drives). Reimagine current games into structured game loops, clear progression systems, and strong layers of intrinsic and extrinsic motivation. Design core loops, meta loops, and long-term progression journeys, along with reward architectures such as badges, unlocks, streaks, and narratives. Transform games like Critter Crunch into multi-level cognitive journeys and sensory-rich, goal-oriented experiences. Build standardized game design frameworks and templates for scalability.

2. Game Design & Systems Thinking: Design engaging mechanics, levels, and systems aligned with literacy and numeracy, cognitive skill development, and occupational therapy goals. Develop adaptive gameplay systems linked to SPEED LDS performance data. Create modular game systems that scale across skills and age groups.

3. Therapeutic & Educational Alignment: Convert IEP goals, SpEdProbe assessments, and therapy plans into gameplay. Design targeted interventions for attention and executive functioning, working memory, motor coordination, and socio-emotional skills. Ensure every game has a clear linkage from outcome to measurable impact.

4. Narrative & Experience Design: Build immersive story worlds, characters, and sensory-driven quests. Create progression narratives that sustain long-term engagement. Design experiences suitable for early learners (3–8 years) and older children (8–13 years).

5. Neurodiverse UX Design: Design for children with ADHD, autism, and learning disabilities. Ensure minimal cognitive overload, clear visual and audio instructions, and predictable interaction patterns. Integrate multi-sensory feedback systems.

6. Data-Driven Iteration: Collaborate with product and analytics teams to track engagement and learning outcomes, optimize game loops and difficulty curves, and improve retention and effectiveness.

7. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Collaborate with special educators and occupational therapists, product and UX teams, and developers. Contribute to the SpEdPLAY roadmap and innovation strategy.

1. Stakeholder management: Build and maintain strong relationships with Brand HQ teams, retailers, service centers, and promoters. Act as the primary point of contact to address queries, resolve concerns, and ensure ongoing support to achieve sales targets.
2. Training: Design and deliver effective training programs for retail owners, service staff, and promoters, ensuring they are well-equipped to understand and communicate the features and benefits of Device Protection Plans.
3. Digital engagement: Engage stakeholders via WhatsApp, email, and calls to share updates, provide support, and drive awareness. Leverage digital tools to generate leads and enhance engagement.
4. Promoter & retail engagement: Work closely with promoters and shop owners to build product visibility and mindshare. Plan and execute promotional activities and events to boost offline sales.
5. Reporting: Maintain accurate records of sales, trainings, and stakeholder interactions. Provide regular reports with insights on performance, market trends, and improvement opportunities.

If you have a proven track record in B2B sales, possess excellent communication and negotiation skills, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you! Join Zopper and take your career to the next level in retail management sales. Apply now!

Key Responsibilities: 

1. Develop and grow revenue from existing customers while strengthening long-term client relationships.
2. Generate new business through cold calling, networking, referrals, and lead conversion activities.
3. Ensure high customer satisfaction through regular communication, follow-ups, and issue resolution.

7. Negotiate contracts, pricing, and rate agreements with customers.
8. Support dispatch teams in coordinating freight movement efficiently and cost-effectively.
9. Maintain accurate documentation, monitor load status, and perform track-and-trace activities as required.

job_description:
MBA Copilot is looking for a full-time contract UI/UX designer to help create the product design for our AI-powered MBA admissions platform from the ground up. MBA Copilot helps applicants build stronger MBA applications using AI. We guide candidates through school selection, profile strategy, essays, resumes, deadlines, and admissions planning. We are looking for someone who can understand the applicant journey, break down complex workflows, and turn rough product ideas into clear, usable Figma designs. The work will involve designing core product flows across onboarding, profile-building, school planning, essay support, resume improvement, deadline tracking, and AI-assisted guidance.

Key Responsibilities: 

1. Create wireframes and Figma designs for core product flows
2. Design the user journey from onboarding to the first dashboard experience
3. Structure flows for profile-building, school selection, essays, resumes, and AI guidance
4. Turn rough product requirements into simple, usable screens
5. Improve the product’s usability, clarity, and overall user experience
6. Study strong competitor products and use relevant patterns thoughtfully
7. Iterate quickly based on feedback from the founding team

job_description:
About the Role:

We're hiring a Full Stack Developer (1–2 years of experience) to help build the web and mobile products at the core of Vitals7. You'll ship real features end-to-end, from React and React Native front ends to FastAPI services on AWS, while working hands-on with modern AI technologies, including RAG pipelines, LLM integrations, and AI agents.

This is a build-focused role with significant ownership and learning opportunities. If you enjoy moving fast, shipping production-ready features, and expanding your AI engineering skills, you'll thrive in this role.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Build and maintain web applications using React.js and mobile applications using React Native (Expo).
2. Design, develop, and integrate REST APIs using FastAPI.
3. Deploy, manage, and monitor services on AWS, including EC2, Lambda, S3, and DynamoDB.
4. Model, manage, and optimize scalable data structures in DynamoDB.
5. Develop serverless applications and workflows using AWS Lambda.
6. Build AI-powered features using RAG, LangChain, and LLM integrations.
7. Collaborate with designers, product teams, and engineers to deliver polished and reliable products.
8. Troubleshoot, profile, and optimize application performance across the stack.
9. Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering best practices.

Why Join Vitals7?

1. Work on cutting-edge AI products with real-world impact.
2. Gain hands-on experience with modern AI technologies, including RAG, LLMs, and AI agents.
3. Take ownership of meaningful projects from concept to production.
4. Collaborate with a fast-moving, high-impact engineering team.
5. Accelerate your growth across full-stack and AI engineering disciplines.

job_description:
Tcules is a design-led product engineering company helping SaaS and tech-first businesses build scalable digital products. Their work spans product design, design systems, frontend and full-stack engineering, and increasingly AI-first product development.

They work closely with founders, product teams, and business leaders to turn ideas into production-ready software. As they expand their business development function, they are looking for a junior BD professional to support the senior BD lead in building a consistent pipeline of qualified opportunities.

What this role really is
This is a junior business development role focused on lead generation, prospect research, outbound outreach, and follow-up execution.

You will work closely with the senior Business Development & Growth lead, who defines the sales strategy, target segments, outreach direction, and overall BD plan. Your role will be to support this strategy through disciplined research, accurate lead building, structured outreach, and clear communication.

This role is ideal for someone early in their BD career who has strong communication skills, curiosity about B2B sales, and interest in learning modern business development in a design and product engineering environment.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Identify buying signals such as company updates, funding news, hiring patterns, and product launches to build qualified lead lists.
2. Research companies, founders, product leaders, CTOs, and other relevant decision-makers.
3. Execute outreach across platforms such as LinkedIn, Upwork, email, and other relevant channels.
4. Draft personalized first-touch messages, follow-ups, LinkedIn notes, and email outreach under guidance.
5. Maintain and update CRM sheets, lead trackers, outreach status, and pipeline data.
6. Track outreach activity, responses, follow-ups, and next steps.
7. Coordinate with the senior BD lead to ensure timely follow-ups with prospects.
8. Organize case studies, proof points, and service references for outreach usage.
9. Use AI tools to improve research, personalization, lead qualification, and outreach preparation.
10. Prepare weekly reports on leads researched, outreach sent, responses received, and key learnings.

They work closely with founders, product teams, and business leaders to turn ideas into production-ready software. As they expand their business development function, they are looking for a junior BD professional to support the senior BD lead in building a consistent pipeline of qualified opportunities.

What this role really is
This is a junior business development role focused on lead generation, prospect research, outbound outreach, and follow-up execution.

You will work closely with the senior Business Development & Growth lead, who defines the sales strategy, target segments, outreach direction, and overall BD plan. Your role will be to support this strategy through disciplined research, accurate lead building, structured outreach, and clear communication.

This role is ideal for someone early in their BD career who has strong communication skills, curiosity about B2B sales, and interest in learning modern business development in a design and product engineering environment.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Identify buying signals such as company updates, funding news, hiring patterns, and product launches to build qualified lead lists.
2. Research companies, founders, product leaders, CTOs, and other relevant decision-makers.
3. Execute outreach across platforms such as LinkedIn, Upwork, email, and other relevant channels.
4. Draft personalized first-touch messages, follow-ups, LinkedIn notes, and email outreach under guidance.
5. Maintain and update CRM sheets, lead trackers, outreach status, and pipeline data.
6. Track outreach activity, responses, follow-ups, and next steps.
7. Coordinate with the senior BD lead to ensure timely follow-ups with prospects.
8. Organize case studies, proof points, and service references for outreach usage.
9. Use AI tools to improve research, personalization, lead qualification, and outreach preparation.
10. Prepare weekly reports on leads researched, outreach sent, responses received, and key learnings.

We're a Consulting & Enablement company and looking for motivated professionals to join our team to work on client-facing projects. As a "Growth Strategist' within our sales team, your main role will be to strategise, identify, win, and retain clients.  With a strong customer focus and excellent interpersonal skills. You would be stepping into the world of Management Consulting and gain experience working with CXO-level leaders.

job_description:
Key Responsibilities: 

A. Talent Acquisition & Onboarding

1. Create and update Job Descriptions in alignment with functional requirements
2. Manage end-to-end recruitment, including screening, interviews, and agency coordination
3. Proactively build a pipeline of talent through platforms like LinkedIn, employee referrals, and direct
sourcing for a lean hiring process with a strong focus on cultural fit
4. Plan manpower needs based on growth plans and new center launches
5. Draft and issue offer letters, appointment letters, and manage joining formalities
6. Coordinate onboarding sessions, including documentation, HRMS entry, and induction with departmental heads

B. Policy Design & Compliance

1. Draft, review, and update HR policies to reflect organizational values and statutory compliance
2. Ensure timely communication and implementation of policies across the organization
3. Conduct periodic compliance audits and process reviews

C. Performance Management

1. Drive the Performance Management System (PMS) in collaboration with department heads
2. Facilitate performance review cycles and ensure timely feedback and goal setting
3. Align PMS frameworks with organizational objectives

D. Employee Engagement & Experience

1. Design and manage monthly engagement & recognition calendars and team-building initiatives
2. Champion a values-driven, inclusive, and purpose-led workplace
3. Create employee communication content (mailers, announcements, etc.)
4. Conduct regular feedback sessions, grievance redressal meetings, and pulse checks

E. HR Operations & Payroll (Compensation, Benefits & Compliance)

1. Maintain and regularly update digital and physical employee records
2. Ensure timely and accurate payroll processing through HRMS, Benchmark salaries, and administer
payroll, and manage benefits cost-effectively
3. Manage HRMS accuracy and data audits
4. Set up employee benefits: insurance, etc.
